original_question: A team of 4 painters worked on a mansion for 3/8ths of a day every day for 3 weeks. How many hours of work did each painter put in? Let's think step by step and output the final answer after "####".

similar_questions.question: A team of 5 carpenters worked on a cabin for 2/5ths of a day every day for 4 weeks. How many hours of work did each carpenter put in?
A team of 6 electricians worked on a warehouse for 1/4ths of a day every day for 2 weeks. How many hours of work did each electrician put in?
A team of 3 mechanics worked on a vehicle for 5/6ths of a day every day for 5 weeks. How many hours of work did each mechanic put in?
A team of 7 chefs worked on a restaurant for 3/10ths of a day every day for 6 weeks. How many hours of work did each chef put in?
A team of 4 gardeners worked on a park for 2/3rds of a day every day for 1 week. How many hours of work did each gardener put in?
